cleaning_steps.name: Ingest raw .xlsb workbook
cleaning_steps.details: Loaded 'Final Sheet' from Book_11.17.2025_Dr. Rad_Final ID.xlsb using pyxlsb; converted into raw CSV with shape 2450 x 55.

cleaning_steps.name: Original column inventory (55 columns)
cleaning_steps.details: Captured all 55 original columns: ID, Roy-ID, Age, Pathology-RT, Pathology-LT, Race, infertile family members, Habits, Hieght, Boby Weight, BMI, Occupation (Exposure to toxic substances), Diabetes, Hypertension, Surgery trauma(s), Varicocele, T.BX, Inguinal hernia, Torsion of spermatic cord, Cancer Type, Cancer Treatment, Orchiopexy, Infertility length, Testis Size right (Sono), RT Size (Orchidometer), RT-XYZ (Sono), Testis Size left (Sono), LT Size (Orchidometer), LT-XYZ (Sono), Sakamoto-RT/mL, Sakamoto-LT/mL, Testicular volume_RT (Guess), Testicular volume_LT (Guess), Seminal plasma pH, Testosterone levels, LH, FSH, Prolactin, TSH, E2, Sex Hormone-Binding Globulin, inhibin B, AMH, Karyotype, Y chromosome microdeletion (AZFa, AZFb, AZFc), Surgery Therapeutic, Successful Sperm Retrieval-1, Outcome1, Successful Sperm Retrieval-2, Outcome2, Successful Sperm Retrieval-3, Outcome3, Successful Sperm Retrieval-4, Outcome4.

cleaning_steps.name: Quantify missingness across all 55 columns
cleaning_steps.details: Computed per-column missing-rate. 9 columns were 100% missing; 40 columns exceeded 50% missingness; baseline demographics (Age, Race) had 0% missing.

cleaning_steps.name: Drop columns with 100% missingness (9 variables)
cleaning_steps.details: Excluded 9 columns that contained zero observed values across the 2450 rows.

cleaning_steps.name: High-missingness columns (>50%) flagged
cleaning_steps.details: 40 columns exceeded the 50% missingness threshold; retained when clinically meaningful (e.g., Karyotype, Y microdeletion, Testis size sono) but flagged with missingness indicators.

strategies.Paper1_strategy: Missingness-indicator features were created for variables with non-trivial missing rates and validated as informative by SHAP (i.e., the fact that a measurement is missing carries clinical signal).
strategies.PaperB_strategy: k-Nearest Neighbors (kNN) imputation was applied across continuous predictors after removing 100%-missing columns.
strategies.categorical: Mode imputation / explicit 'Unknown' category for categorical variables when used.
strategies.outcome_handling: Records with missing Outcome1 were excluded from the analytical cohort (2450 -> 2413 after dropping 37 rows with missing Outcome1).

cleaning_steps.name: Outcome integrity & cohort definition
cleaning_steps.details: Defined analytical cohort = rows with non-missing Outcome1 (n=2413). Outcome1 distribution: failure_0 = 1527, success_1 = 886, success rate = 36.7%.

cleaning_steps.name: Primary vs Salvage mTESE classification
cleaning_steps.details: Engineered is_Primary and Salvage_Count flags from Successful Sperm Retrieval-1..4 / Outcome1..4 columns. Primary mTESE = 2234 (91.2%), Salvage mTESE = 216 (8.8%).

cleaning_steps.name: Free-text pathology parsing (NLP)
cleaning_steps.details: Custom regex/NLP pipeline parsed free-text bilateral pathology reports (Pathology-RT and Pathology-LT) into 22 quantitative features (per-side percentages, binary indicators, missingness flags) covering SCO, CSTH, Maturation Arrest stages 1-4, and Hypospermatogenesis. Percentage handling: regex extracts explicit % when present, else assigns 100 if the pattern is found. MA hierarchy enforced: if arrested at an earlier phase, later phases set to 0 (Spermatogonial → Spermatocytic → ImmatureRound → Elongated).

cleaning_steps.name: Data quality checks performed
checks: Row-count integrity vs source xlsb (2450 rows confirmed)
Per-column dtype inference and coercion of numeric strings
Outlier scan on continuous hormonal and anthropometric variables
Cross-field consistency: Outcome1 vs Successful Sperm Retrieval-1
Bilateral consistency between Pathology-RT and Pathology-LT extracted features
Maturation Arrest hierarchy enforcement (no later-phase MA without earlier resolved)
Stratified Outcome1 distribution check across Primary/Salvage subgroups

sixteen_pathology_indicators.description: 16 newly engineered pathology indicators derived from free-text Pathology-RT / Pathology-LT reports (8 per testis side).
right_testis_RT: MA_Spermatogonial_RT (Maturation Arrest at Spermatogonial phase - Right)
MA_Spermatocytic_RT (Maturation Arrest at Spermatocytic phase - Right)
MA_ImmatureRound_RT (Maturation Arrest at Immature Round Spermatid phase - Right)
MA_Elongated_RT (Maturation Arrest at Elongated Spermatid phase - Right)
left_testis_LT: MA_Spermatogonial_LT (Maturation Arrest at Spermatogonial phase - Left)
MA_Spermatocytic_LT (Maturation Arrest at Spermatocytic phase - Left)
MA_ImmatureRound_LT (Maturation Arrest at Immature Round Spermatid phase - Left)
MA_Elongated_LT (Maturation Arrest at Elongated Spermatid phase - Left)
sixteen_pathology_indicators.ma_hierarchy_rule: If arrested at earlier phase, later phases set to 0 (Spermatogonial → Spermatocytic → ImmatureRound → Elongated)
sixteen_pathology_indicators.percentage_handling: Regex extracts explicit % when present, else 100 if pattern found
sixteen_pathology_indicators.additional_aggregated_pathology_features: Per-side mean and binary aggregates (SCO mean/binary; CSTH mean/binary) and Pathology availability RT/LT flags bring the total histopathology feature block to 22 features in the modeling matrix.

transformations.name: Standardization
transformations.method: Z-score standardization (mean=0, std=1) applied to continuous features prior to model input
transformations.scope: All continuous predictors: Age, BMI, Height, Weight, FSH, LH, Testosterone, Prolactin, E2, testicular volume measurements, Sakamoto volumes, Seminal plasma pH
transformations.fitting: Scaler fit on training set ONLY, then applied to test set (no leakage)

transformations.name: Categorical encoding
transformations.method: One-hot / label encoding for categorical variables (Race, Habits, Karyotype categories, Y-microdeletion AZFa/AZFb/AZFc, Occupation exposure)
transformations.binary_flags: Comorbidities and surgical history kept as 0/1 binary indicators

transformations.name: Missingness indicator encoding (Paper1)
transformations.method: For each variable with non-trivial missingness, an auxiliary binary feature was added flagging missing-vs-observed; SHAP confirmed informativeness.

transformations.name: kNN imputation (PaperB)
transformations.method: k-Nearest Neighbors imputation on continuous predictors after standardization scaffolding

transformations.name: Pathology percentage normalization
transformations.method: Free-text percentages parsed via regex; explicit % values used directly, else default 100 when pattern detected; MA stage hierarchy enforced (zero out later stages if earlier-stage arrest)

transformations.name: Class imbalance handling
transformations.method: SMOTE (Synthetic Minority Over-sampling Technique) applied ONLY to the training set after the train/test split, never to the test set

transformations.name: Train/test split
transformations.method: Stratified 80/20 split on Outcome1, random_state=42; alternative split (≈70/30, n_train=1689, n_test=724) used for calibration analyses
